verses.text: After Nadab and Abihu, Aaron may not enter the holy place at will. Not at will. The holiest is approached only as God appoints.
After Nadab and Abihu, Aaron may not enter the holy place at will. Not at will. The holiest is approached only as God appoints.
He enters with a bullock and two goats. The offerings. Atonement requires blood.
He enters with a bullock and two goats. The offerings. Atonement requires blood.
He enters with a bullock and two goats. The offerings. Atonement requires blood.
One goat is for the LORD, one for the scapegoat. Two goats. Sin is both atoned and borne away.
One goat is for the LORD, one for the scapegoat. Two goats. Sin is both atoned and borne away.
One goat is for the LORD, one for the scapegoat. Two goats. Sin is both atoned and borne away.
One goat is for the LORD, one for the scapegoat. Two goats. Sin is both atoned and borne away.
One goat is for the LORD, one for the scapegoat. Two goats. Sin is both atoned and borne away.
He offers the bullock and sprinkles its blood on the mercy seat. Within the veil. Once a year he enters with blood.
He offers the bullock and sprinkles its blood on the mercy seat. Within the veil. Once a year he enters with blood.
He offers the bullock and sprinkles its blood on the mercy seat. Within the veil. Once a year he enters with blood.
He offers the bullock and sprinkles its blood on the mercy seat. Within the veil. Once a year he enters with blood.
The goat's blood atones for the holy place and the altar. Cleansed. Even the sanctuary needs atoning.
The goat's blood atones for the holy place and the altar. Cleansed. Even the sanctuary needs atoning.
The goat's blood atones for the holy place and the altar. Cleansed. Even the sanctuary needs atoning.
The goat's blood atones for the holy place and the altar. Cleansed. Even the sanctuary needs atoning.
The goat's blood atones for the holy place and the altar. Cleansed. Even the sanctuary needs atoning.
He confesses Israel's sins over the scapegoat, sent into the wilderness. Borne away. Sin is carried far off.
He confesses Israel's sins over the scapegoat, sent into the wilderness. Borne away. Sin is carried far off.
He confesses Israel's sins over the scapegoat, sent into the wilderness. Borne away. Sin is carried far off.
Aaron washes and offers the burnt offerings. Washed. The priest is cleansed after.
Aaron washes and offers the burnt offerings. Washed. The priest is cleansed after.
Aaron washes and offers the burnt offerings. Washed. The priest is cleansed after.
Those who handle the goat and the bullock must wash. Defilement. Sin-bearing defiles.
Those who handle the goat and the bullock must wash. Defilement. Sin-bearing defiles.
Those who handle the goat and the bullock must wash. Defilement. Sin-bearing defiles.
The tenth day is a sabbath of affliction, a statute for ever. Affliction. The people humble themselves.
The tenth day is a sabbath of affliction, a statute for ever. Affliction. The people humble themselves.
The tenth day is a sabbath of affliction, a statute for ever. Affliction. The people humble themselves.
The high priest atones once a year for all Israel. Once a year. Atonement is made for the whole nation.
The high priest atones once a year for all Israel. Once a year. Atonement is made for the whole nation.
